name: sim_quad_holodeck_igt_leviathan_fep
scope_note: 4-shell / 5-shell coexistence test (step 4 of coupling program: multi-shell coexistence). Cites system_v5/new docs/OWNER_DOCTRINE_SELF_SIMILAR_FRAMEWORKS.md. Statements use 'survived' / 'admissible under joint coupling' / 'joint coupling excludes ...'. No creates/derives/drives language.
exclusion_language_note: k-wise coupling uses 'joint coupling excludes ...' / 'survived' / 'admissible under joint coupling'. No create/derive/drive language.
coupling_description: 4-way coupling excludes: projection_quotient AND pareto_non_minimal AND coalition_stable AND vfe_nonincreasing without free_energy_consensus_quad

negative.description: k-wise coupling forced FALSE; joint admissible set must be empty

boundary.description: k-wise coupling forced TRUE; joint reduces to (k-1)-wise triple joint

z3.reason: load_bearing: k-wise joint SAT and k-wise-exclusion-witness SAT/UNSAT decides whether k-way coupling strictly excludes beyond all embedded (k-1)-triples

sympy.reason: supportive only; Boolean admissibility at k-wise layer does not require symbolic algebra

clifford.reason: not applicable at Boolean k-wise coupling layer

pytorch.reason: no gradient surface at Boolean k-wise admissibility layer
